boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on hazard-control status
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-AST-081-P requires exact hazard-control status match before PO execution
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Abstract hazard-control evidence defect open per WARN-AST-081 and STD-AST-081-P

final_answer: Execution release REL-AST-081 covers PO-AST-081 and controls but omits explicit abstract hazard-control evidence demanded by WARN-AST-081 and STD-AST-081-P. Source boundary remains open on regulated status. Escalate for exact closure proof before any purchase action.
